name: memact-origin
description: High-precision origin candidate engine for Memact thought queries.

scripts.sample: node ./src/cli.mjs --input examples/sample-inference-output.json --thought "I need to build something real before applying anywhere" --format report
scripts.sample:json: node ./src/cli.mjs --input examples/sample-inference-output.json --thought "I need to build something real before applying anywhere" --format json
